sp_k_vs_team_total.description: Home SP F5 Ks vs Opposing (Away) Team Total Score
sp_k_vs_team_total.rationale: High-K SP suppresses opposing runs. Positive r -> Under + K-Over legs are correlated.

game_total_vs_home_score.description: Game Total Over vs Home Score (star-hitter proxy)
game_total_vs_home_score.rationale: High-scoring games lift individual batter TB/Hits lines. Star-hitter Over and Game Over are positively correlated.

both_sp_k_vs_close_game.description: Both SP F5 Ks >= 3 vs Close Game (|margin| <= 1)
both_sp_k_vs_close_game.rationale: Dual-dominance keeps scores suppressed + balanced. Positive r -> Elite Duel script: Under + both K + RL cover.

sp_k_vs_star_hitter_tb.description: Home SP F5 Ks vs Home Team Total Score (star-hitter TB proxy)
sp_k_vs_star_hitter_tb.rationale: High-K SP on home side correlates with SP dominating, which means less bullpen usage and the home lineup gets full at-bats. Star hitter TB = home score proxy (same direction as game_total_vs_home_score but conditioned on home SP dominance).

f5_total_vs_game_total.description: F5 Total vs Full Game Total
f5_total_vs_game_total.rationale: F5 total strongly predicts full game total (0.56 fraction assumption validity)

f5_under_vs_game_over_conditional.description: F5 Under vs Full Game Over (conditioned: gassed BP + elite SP)
f5_under_vs_game_over_conditional.rationale: Seeded r=+0.10. In the gassed-bullpen + elite-SP universe, dominant SP produces F5 Under then exhausted BP surrenders late runs, flipping the normally-negative F5/game correlation.
